text: Welcome to the community, @helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. We're excited to have you help keep our space safe and friendly.
Welcome to the community, @guide_sam! You've been approved as an event helper. We can't wait to see the great events you'll help organize.
Welcome to the community, @newbie_kim! You've been approved as a member. Feel free to introduce yourself and get to know everyone.
Welcome to the community, @mentor_lina! You've been approved as a mentor. We're so grateful you're here to help guide new members.
